messages.body: Hello Mika, Good afternoon!  I found your salon on Groupon, and I’m assuming I’m speaking to the owner- apologies in advance if I got the name wrong, I actually tried checking your GBP before messaging you!  This is Sima…

Please accept my sincere apologies for the delayed response - I was observing Diwali, India's festival of lights, with my family over the past few days.  I completely understand your concerns regarding client acquisition…
